title: Method of preparing virtual machine, method of managing downloading and uploading files at virtual machine and system therefor
abstract: The present invention discloses methods of preparing a virtual machine (VM), managing downloading and uploading files at VM and a system therefor. The system comprises an identity management module comprising a console operation template for preparing a VM; an external database for storing data and information related to the VM including authentication credential information inputs including the identity profile, username and password for use in a verification process; and a policy advisor module comprising a priority rule defining a scale of priority levels for managing downloading and uploading files at the VM. The system is implemented using a server system located at a layer external to the VM.
claims:
Claims 1. A method of preparing a virtual machine, VM, having a security measure in cloud environment, characterized in that, the method comprising the steps of: defining, by a user, characteristics of a VM by configuring components and settings related thereto through a console operation template, wherein the console operation template deployed at an identity management module comprises an array of console buttons accommodating the characteristics therein; assigning a sequential number to the array of console buttons having allocated with the characteristics thereby determining a mutual combined number by joining the sequential number assigned to each console button end to end; relaying the mutual combined number and the characteristics defined thereof to the user and the identity management module; and establishing an identity profile of the VM based on the console operation template that is filled up with the characteristics thereof and the mutual combined number thereof, wherein the identity profile of the VM is associated to the user. 2. The method according to Claim 1 , wherein the characteristics of the VM include a guest operating system profile, a hardware profile and a virtual hard disk. 3. The method according to Claim 1 , wherein the array of console buttons of the console operation template is positionable and arrangeable according to a predefined fashion. 4. A method of managing downloading and uploading files at a virtual machine, VM, in cloud environment, characterized in that, the method comprising the steps of: initiating a verification process to provide access to the VM, wherein the verification process based on authentication credential information inputs comprises: 

 verifying a first authentication credential information input by comparing against that of stored in an external database, wherein the first authentication credential information input comprises a username and a password inputted by a user; and verifying a second authentication credential information input by comparing against that of stored in the external database, wherein the second authentication credential information input comprises an identity profile of the VM comprising characteristics defined on a console operation template deployed at an identity management module and a mutual combined number, wherein the mutual combined number has a sequential number assigned to each console button that is joined end to end; applying a priority rule for downloading and uploading of the files at the VM, wherein the priority rule defining a scale of priority levels is based on the authentication credential information inputs factored in the verification process and associated data of the VM; and executing the downloading and uploading of the files at the VM based on the priority rule thereof. 5. A system for virtual machines, VMs, connecting a user and the VMs in cloud environment, characterized in that, the system implemented using a server system located at a layer external to the VMs comprising: an identity management module comprising a console operation template configured for preparing a virtual machine, VM, having an identity profile associated to the user, wherein the identity profile of the VM is based on the console operation template filled up with characteristics of the VM defined by the user and a mutual combined number derived therefrom, wherein the console operation template comprises an array of console buttons accommodating the characteristics of the VM that are assigned with a sequential number to each console button to derive the mutual combined number, wherein the mutual combined number comprises the sequential number from each console button that is joined end to end; an external database connected to the identity management module configured for storing data and information related to the VM including authentication credential information inputs for use in a verification process to 

 provide access to the VM including the identity profile, username and password; and a policy advisor module coupled to the identity management module configured for managing downloading and uploading files at the VM, wherein the policy advisor module comprises a priority rule defining a scale of priority levels that is based on the authentication credential information inputs and associated data of the VM.
